{{Quote|Ye lords and makers. Look at them all.|Valtis seeing the Alliance fleet|<ref name="Newest Rebels" />}}
'''Valtis''' was a member of the [[Virgillian Free Alignment/Legends|Virgillian Free Alignment]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. He was the [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] of the ''[[Flurry]]''.<ref name="Bakura novel" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' {{1st}}
*{{WEGCite|story=Newest Rebels|book=The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook}}
